rules.rule_text:
rule TrojanCookies_CCREW
{
	meta:
		author = "AlienVault Labs"
		info = "CommentCrew-threat-apt1"

	strings:
		$a = "sleep:" wide ascii
		$b = "content=" wide ascii
		$c = "reqpath=" wide ascii
		$d = "savepath=" wide ascii
		$e = "command=" wide ascii

	condition:
		4 of ( $a , $b , $c , $d , $e )
}
